stories.title: Real Care Stories
stories.subtitle: Experience the journey of hope and healing through the lives we've touched.

1.name: James
1.review: Everything from the initial consultation to the recovery was handled with extreme professionalism. I saved over 60% compared to UK prices.

2.name: Abdel
2.review: The medical care in Kerala is world-class. My doctor was very patient and explained everything clearly. Highly recommended!

3.name: Sarah
3.review: I combined my treatment with a vacation in Munnar. It was the most relaxing recovery ever. MedTour assistants are amazing.

4.name: Elena
4.review: The surgical team was incredible. I felt safe and cared for every step of the way.

5.name: Omar
5.review: Crystal clear vision now. The facility in Kochi felt like a 5-star hotel.

6.name: Marcus
6.review: MedTour handled all logistics. I could focus entirely on my recovery.
